data.title: Ripple receives Dubai Financial Services Authority license to provide crypto payment services in the UAE
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Arif Amiri, CEO of Dubai International Financial Center (DIFC), said that Ripple has obtained full regulatory approval from the Dubai Financial Services Authority (DFSA) to provide cross-border crypto payment services in the UAE. The company announced on March 13 that it had obtained its DFSA license, allowing it to operate in the Dubai International Financial Center (DIFC). DIFC is a free economic zone in the UAE with its own tax policies and regulatory framework. 
Earlier news, on October 1, 2024, Ripple revealed that they are working to obtain a DFSA license in order to launch its digital asset infrastructure in the UAE. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: CryptoQuant: Ethereum has seen record-breaking active selling in the past three months
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoQuant founder and CEO Ki Young Ju released data on the X platform saying that Ethereum has faced record active selling in the past 3 months.

data.title: Stablecoin Market Cap Surpasses Ethereum
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from CoinGecko on March 13 reveals that the total market capitalization of stablecoins has reached $235.6 billion, surpassing Ethereum's market cap of $225.9 billion. Among stablecoins, USDT leads with a market cap of $143.3 billion, followed by USDC at $58.3 billion, and USDS at $8.23 billion.

data.title: Ethereum Experiences Record Active Selling Over Past Three Months
data.description: According to Odaily, Ki Young Ju, the founder and CEO of CryptoQuant, shared data on the X platform indicating that Ethereum has faced unprecedented levels of active selling in the last three months.

data.title: AscendEX will list Bigfoot (BIG)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Bigfoot (BIG) at 16:00 on March 13, opening the BIG/USDT trading pair, and is now open for deposits.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is an excellent Memecoin trading platform. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first launch rate is as high as 80%.

data.title: Ripple Secures Regulatory Approval For Crypto Payments In UAE
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, blockchain payment provider Ripple has received full regulatory approval from the Dubai Financial Services Authority (DFSA) to offer cross-border crypto payment services in the United Arab Emirates (UAE). The company announced on March 13 that it had secured its DFSA license, allowing it to operate in the Dubai International Financial Center (DIFC), a UAE free-economic zone with its own tax policies and regulatory framework. This announcement follows nearly six months after Ripple initially received in-principle approval for the DFSA license. On October 1, 2024, Ripple revealed its efforts to become licensed by the DFSA as part of its strategy to expand its digital asset infrastructure in the UAE.

With this license, Ripple is now positioned to provide its global blockchain-based payment solutions to businesses across the UAE. The company emphasized that this development enables it to support financial institutions seeking partners to integrate digital assets into real-world applications. Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse highlighted the UAE's favorable environment for tech and crypto innovation, stating, "We are entering an unprecedented period of growth for the crypto industry, driven by greater regulatory clarity around the world and increasing institutional adoption." Ripple also noted a surge in demand for cross-border payments across the Middle East, with interest coming not only from crypto-native firms but also from traditional financial institutions.

Ripple's DFSA approval marks a significant milestone as it becomes the first blockchain-enabled payments provider to operate within DIFC’s free zone. DIFC CEO Arif Amiri expressed enthusiasm about Ripple's commitment to Dubai, stating, "We are thrilled that Ripple is deepening their commitment to Dubai by securing a DFSA license that makes them the first blockchain-enabled payments provider in DIFC." The license opens up opportunities for Ripple in the UAE and the broader MENA region, allowing the company to expand its reach and influence in the area.

data.title: South African Bitcoin Ponzi Scheme Leader Detained Over Unanswered Questions
data.description: According to Foresight News, Clynton Marks, the mastermind behind the South African Bitcoin Ponzi scheme MTI, has been detained. The detention stems from his inability to adequately answer questions from liquidators regarding the withdrawal of Bitcoin from his MTI account. Marks stated, "I am trying my best to answer all questions. Unfortunately, my memory is not good enough to recall all these different transactions, and it seems I cannot communicate with the people who operated the account for me." Previously, Marks had delegated the investment and withdrawal responsibilities to two partners, Don Nkomo and Andrew Caw. In 2022, Marks, along with Steynberg and others, was ordered to repay $291 million.

data.title: China Banknote Printing and Minting Corporation Warns Against Cryptocurrency Scams
data.description: According to Foresight News, the China Banknote Printing and Minting Corporation has issued a statement addressing reports of fraudulent activities. The corporation clarified that it has not engaged in the sale of virtual currencies through any websites or apps. The statement urged the public to remain vigilant against scams to protect their financial interests and avoid potential losses.

data.title: PWEASE rose above 0.049 USDT. Since its listing on LBank, the maximum increase has reached 1,124%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to LBank market data: PWEASE rose above 0.049USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.0499USDT, and is now quoted at 0.038USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 40%. Since its launch on LBank, the current maximum increase has reached 1,124%, and the current market value is approximately US$38 million.

data.title: ARKB saw $82.6 million in Bitcoin inflows yesterday
data.description: According to Cointelegraph monitoring, Ark 21Shares Bitcoin ETF (ARKB) received 996 BTC yesterday, worth approximately $82.6 million.
